notes: Iteration #1 branch 001: first cross-sectional strategy in quant-loop.

Universe is rank-based across `target_universe` (10 majors), but only symbols with daily data on the canonical Binance fapi feed are tradeable today (3 symbols today: BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT). The strategy is built to take any N >= 6 and the per-leg weights are adapted so the position caps hold.
Portfolio: long top-K, short bottom-K, equal-weight within each side (1/(2K) of NAV per leg, capped at per_symbol_max_pct_nav).
Rebalance: every 1d bar at the configured UTC hour; signals are computed on the prior bar's close.
Risk: -2% daily PnL -> flatten all positions; -5% monthly PnL -> pause 30d.
Universe filter: a symbol must have >= 5 bars in the last 7d AND daily USD volume (close*volume) > $1M.
